allow: Bash(venv/Scripts/python manage.py shell -c "from django.contrib.auth.models import User; u = User.objects.filter\(username='admin'\).first\(\); print\('exists:', bool\(u\)\); print\('has_usable_password:', u.has_usable_password\(\) if u else 'N/A'\)")
